title: 倒轉方舟 Project: AHNO's Ark
description:
Surround your opponent with pieces, obstacles, and summons to instantly eliminate enemy pieces, including bosses.

This tactic works even against multiple players in a single encirclement.

In a distant future, the world has been destroyed by war and pollution.

A self-proclaimed goddess, Yarno, has established a laboratory in the snowy wilderness and orchestrated a game of mutual slaughter.

Players take on the role of a tribe's leader, who must protect their people while also unraveling the truth behind this deadly game...
description_short: This game merges elements of tactical RPG, Go, and introduces Roguelite features. Players will need to make decisions among numerous random events and capability divergences, trying to survive in an apocalyptic game of mutual destruction.
